offer: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, inefficient processing causes delays in claims resolution. We simplify document digitization and form population instead of manual data entry and document handling.
problem: Inefficient processing of paper documents leads to delays in claims resolution.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Participate in community forums for insurance tools
try_it: Let users try document scanning and interface for adjustments on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
